pi_items.source: Task description specifies: 'Create a file at `/home/ga/Documents/meeting_portal.html`'

Verified against Jitsi Meet IFrame API documentation (https://jitsi.github.io/handbook/docs/dev-guide/dev-guide-iframe/). Self-hosted instances serve external_api.js at the root: https://<your-domain>/external_api.js. Docker-compose configuration confirms localhost:8080 is the correct base URL with DISABLE_HTTPS=1, BOSH_RELATIVE=true, and PUBLIC_URL=http://localhost:8080
Task description specifies: 'Room Name: `WeeklyOpsReview`'. Verifier (line 91) confirms this exact string must be present in HTML content.
Task description specifies: 'Set `displayName` to `"Operations Manager"`'. Verifier (line 98) confirms both 'Operations Manager' and 'displayName' must be present in HTML content.

Task description specifies: 'Set `subject` to `"Weekly Operations Review - Q4 Planning"`'. Verified that 'subject' is a valid Jitsi Meet configOverwrite option. Verifier (line 113) confirms partial match of 'Weekly Operations Review' in HTML content.

privileged_info_summary: All metadata values have been verified. The task requires embedding a Jitsi Meet conference using the IFrame External API. The API script is correctly located at http://localhost:8080/external_api.js according to Jitsi Meet documentation. The HTML file must be created at /home/ga/Documents/meeting_portal.html. The meeting configuration must include: room name 'WeeklyOpsReview', display name 'Operations Manager', subject 'Weekly Operations Review - Q4 Planning', with audio and video muted on start. The task is synthetic (benchmark task), not based on external datasets.
